summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Marketing Agent role and features. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). All UI tests passed - verified login without role dropdown, marketing agent redirect to /marketing, sidebar role-based navigation, Marketing Dashboard stats, Forms CRUD, Gallery, and webhook endpoint.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended

critical_code_review_comments: Login page correctly has NO role dropdown - role is auto-detected from database
Marketing agent correctly redirected from /dashboard to /marketing via useEffect
Marketing agent sidebar shows only: Marketing, Forms, Gallery, Settings (no Dashboard, Leads, Appointments)
Admin sidebar includes Marketing, Forms, Gallery items
Marketing Dashboard shows Total Forms, Total Leads, Media Files, Platforms stats
Platform Breakdown section shows Facebook data correctly
Form Performance table shows forms with leads/deals/conversion metrics
Forms page lists forms with platform badge, headline, performance metrics
Create Form modal has Name, Platform, Headline, Description, Questions, Media fields
AI Assist buttons present for Headline and Description fields
Edit form modal opens with pre-filled data
Gallery page has All/Images/Videos filters and Upload button
Webhook endpoint POST /api/webhooks/form/{form_id} creates leads without auth (public endpoint)
seed_data_creation: Marketing agent user and Facebook Summer Promo form were pre-created by main agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Marketing features fully functional. Marketing agent role has restricted sidebar (Marketing, Forms, Gallery, Settings only). Webhook endpoint is public (no auth required). Gallery files stored at /app/uploads/media/. AI Writing Assistant component exists but requires LLM integration testing separately.

features_verified.create_form_modal_fields: PASS - Has Name, Platform, Headline, Description, Questions, Media
features_verified.ai_assist_buttons: PASS - AI Assist buttons present for Headline and Description
features_verified.question_builder: PASS - Can add questions with text/dropdown types
features_verified.edit_form_button: PASS - Opens Edit Form modal with pre-filled data
